preferences.name: cliPath
preferences.title: CLI Path
preferences.description: Path to the apple-loc CLI binary (default: ~/.local/bin/apple-loc)

preferences.name: dbPath
preferences.title: Database Path
preferences.description: Path to the localization database file (default: ~/.apple-loc/apple-loc.db)

preferences.name: resultLimit
preferences.title: Result Limit
preferences.description: Maximum number of results per query (default: 20)

preferences.name: fuzzy
preferences.title: Fuzzy Matching
preferences.description: Enable fuzzy (substring) matching for key and target lookups
preferences.label: Enable fuzzy matching

commands.name: search-localizations
commands.title: Search Text
commands.description: Find translations by meaning using semantic search

commands.name: lookup-by-key
commands.title: Lookup by Key
commands.description: Find translations by source key (substring match)

commands.name: lookup-by-target
commands.title: Lookup by Target
commands.description: Reverse lookup source keys from translated text

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
